instruction: Plan the closure of agent 5's open cases 31, 32 and 53, recording a closure timestamp for every one and minding each case's transfer history when choosing the closing action. Email the primary contact of each case's account with subject 'Case <id> resolved' and a brief body, and email agent 5 once with subject 'Case load resolved'.
rationale_hint: Case 31 has transfer_count 4 (blocked: db_update path with closed_at); 32 and 53 are closable via attempt_close_case. Account mapping 31->12, 32->18, 53->8 must be read.

provenance.source_benchmark: PlanBench (Valmeekam et al., 2023); FlowBench plan-generation variant (Xiao et al., 2024); WorkArena L2 compositional (Boisvert et al., 2024)
provenance.adaptation: Author-constructed scenario over the local CRM seed; mechanical plan validation, plan-length difficulty, and temperature 0 follow PlanBench; plan-generation framing follows FlowBench and WorkArena L2. No benchmark text or data is reproduced. Sub-class: mixed_blocked.
provenance.license: Original work by the author (scenarios, goal specs, action doc); benchmark semantics reference only
